profile.name: Akhilesh Angadi
profile.headline: Cloud & DevOps Engineer | SAP ECS | Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD | Ex-Juniper Networks
profile.headline_raw: Innovative Cloud Engineer at SAP Enterprise Cloud Service | Ex–Juniper Networks | Master’s in Information Technology and Management

headline_structured.education_highlight: Master’s in Information Technology and Management

profile.about_raw:
🚀 Passionate and results-driven Software Engineer with a knack for coding and exploring cutting-edge technologies. As a dedicated team player, I thrive on translating business requirements into innovative products through smart design and efficient feature implementation. My expertise spans UI, backend development, and DevOps.

Key Skills & Superpowers:

💡 Solution Architect: Crafting scalable solutions aligned with organisational goals, ensuring a foundation for future growth.

💻 Full Stack Maestro: Building UI and backend components using modern frameworks for intuitive user experiences.

🛠️ DevOps Dynamo: Automating build and deployment pipelines, optimising CI, and ensuring smooth workflows for faster delivery.

🌐 API Aficionado: Designing Web API wrappers to enhance system interoperability, ensuring seamless communication between services.

🛠️ Code Refactoring Guru: Elevating code quality with optimizations, refactoring, and rigorous test cases for performance and maintainability.

🔒 Security Sentinel: Leading efforts in server security, timely updates, and patches to safeguard data integrity and compliance.

🤝 Team Maestro: Skilled Release and Sprint Manager, fostering collaboration through communication and engagement. Active in cross-functional teams and customer interactions.

⚙️ Kubernetes, Helm & Docker Expert: Managing containerised apps on Kubernetes using Helm, ensuring scalability, security, and fault tolerance. Key in moving apps to in-house cloud infrastructure.

🖥️ Migration Specialist: Seamless migration of vCenter VMs to Proxmox, optimising virtualisation and infrastructure performance.

🌱 Talent Cultivator: Contributing to organisational growth by mentoring teams, hiring, and campus recruitment.

Ready to bring this expertise to a forward-thinking environment. Let’s connect! 🚀🤝

#TechInnovation #CloudChampion #DevOpsMaestro #FullStackInnovator #KubernetesExpert

about_structured.summary: Passionate and results-driven Software Engineer specializing in Cloud, DevOps, and Full Stack Development with strong experience in building scalable systems and automating infrastructure.
